[index.html](https://github.com/user-attachments/files/28931495/index.html)
<!DOCTYPE html>
<html lang="da">
<head>
<meta charset="UTF-8">
<meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1.0">
<title>Performance Tuning — Danmarks førende indenfor tuning af biler</title>
<link rel="preconnect" href="https://fonts.googleapis.com">
<link rel="preconnect" href="https://fonts.gstatic.com" crossorigin>
<link href="https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Saira+Condensed:ital,wght@0,400;0,600;0,700;0,800;0,900;1,700;1,800;1,900&family=Inter:wght@400;500;600;700&display=swap" rel="stylesheet">
<style>
  :root{
    --bg:#070C18;
    --bg-2:#0B1326;
    --panel:#0E1830;
    --panel-2:#13233F;
    --line:rgba(126,139,166,.14);
    --line-strong:rgba(126,139,166,.28);
    --steel:#7E8BA6;
    --silver:#C7D0E0;
    --white:#EFF3FA;
    --red:#D7382E;
    --red-bright:#EE4A3D;
    --red-deep:#8E1C16;
    --blue-line:#4E7AB8;
    --display:'Saira Condensed', system-ui, sans-serif;
    --body:'Inter', system-ui, sans-serif;
    --maxw:1200px;
  }

  *{box-sizing:border-box;margin:0;padding:0}
  html{scroll-behavior:smooth}
  body{
    background:var(--bg);
    color:var(--silver);
    font-family:var(--body);
    font-size:17px;
    line-height:1.65;
    -webkit-font-smoothing:antialiased;
    overflow-x:hidden;
  }
  a{color:inherit;text-decoration:none}
  img{display:block;max-width:100%}

  .wrap{max-width:var(--maxw);margin:0 auto;padding:0 28px}

  .eyebrow{
    font-family:var(--display);
    text-transform:uppercase;
    letter-spacing:.34em;
    font-weight:700;
    font-size:.78rem;
    color:var(--red-bright);
    display:inline-flex;
    align-items:center;
    gap:.7rem;
  }
  .eyebrow::before{
    content:"";width:30px;height:2px;background:var(--red);display:inline-block;
  }

  h2.section-title{
    font-family:var(--display);
    font-weight:800;
    font-size:clamp(2.1rem,5vw,3.6rem);
    line-height:.98;
    color:var(--white);
    letter-spacing:-.01em;
    text-transform:uppercase;
  }

  /* ---------- NAV ---------- */
  header.nav{
    position:fixed;top:0;left:0;right:0;z-index:50;
    transition:background .4s ease, border-color .4s ease, padding .4s ease;
    border-bottom:1px solid transparent;
    animation:navIn .7s .15s ease backwards;
  }
  @keyframes navIn{from{opacity:0;transform:translateY(-14px)}to{opacity:1;transform:none}}
  header.nav.scrolled{
    background:rgba(7,12,24,.82);
    backdrop-filter:blur(14px);
    border-bottom:1px solid var(--line);
  }
  .nav-inner{
    max-width:var(--maxw);margin:0 auto;padding:18px 28px;
    display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:space-between;gap:24px;
  }
  .nav-logo{display:flex;align-items:center;gap:12px}
  .nav-logo img{height:46px;width:auto;filter:drop-shadow(0 2px 10px rgba(0,0,0,.5))}
  .nav-links{display:flex;align-items:center;gap:34px}
  .nav-links a{
    font-family:var(--display);
    text-transform:uppercase;
    letter-spacing:.13em;
    font-weight:600;font-size:.92rem;color:var(--silver);
    position:relative;padding:4px 0;transition:color .25s;
  }
  .nav-links a::after{
    content:"";position:absolute;left:0;bottom:-2px;width:0;height:2px;background:var(--red);transition:width .3s ease;
  }
  .nav-links a:hover{color:var(--white)}
  .nav-links a:hover::after{width:100%}

  .btn{
    font-family:var(--display);
    text-transform:uppercase;
    letter-spacing:.14em;
    font-weight:800;font-size:.95rem;
    display:inline-flex;align-items:center;gap:.6rem;
    padding:14px 26px;border-radius:3px;cursor:pointer;border:none;
    transition:transform .2s ease, box-shadow .3s ease, background .3s ease;
  }
  .btn-red{
    background:linear-gradient(135deg,var(--red-bright),var(--red-deep));
    color:#fff;
    box-shadow:0 8px 28px rgba(215,56,46,.32), inset 0 1px 0 rgba(255,255,255,.18);
  }
  .btn-red:hover{transform:translateY(-2px);box-shadow:0 14px 40px rgba(238,74,61,.5)}
  .btn-red .arrow{transition:transform .25s}
  .btn-red:hover .arrow{transform:translateX(4px)}
  .btn-ghost{
    background:transparent;color:var(--white);
    border:1px solid var(--line-strong);
  }
  .btn-ghost:hover{border-color:var(--red);color:var(--white);transform:translateY(-2px)}

  .nav-toggle{display:none;background:none;border:none;color:var(--white);cursor:pointer}

  /* ---------- HERO ---------- */
  .hero{
    position:relative;min-height:100vh;min-height:100svh;
    display:flex;flex-direction:column;justify-content:flex-end;
    overflow:hidden;
  }
  .hero-bg{
    position:absolute;inset:0;
    background-image:url('data:image/jpeg;base64,');
    background-size:cover;
    background-position:center 38%;
    transform:scale(1.12);
    filter:blur(26px);
    opacity:.3;
    animation:heroIn 1.8s cubic-bezier(.2,.55,.2,1) .1s forwards;
  }
  @keyframes heroIn{
    0%{filter:blur(26px);opacity:.3;transform:scale(1.12)}
    100%{filter:blur(0);opacity:1;transform:scale(1.03)}
  }
  .hero-bg::after{
    content:"";position:absolute;inset:0;
    background:
      radial-gradient(120% 80% at 50% 28%, rgba(7,12,24,0) 0%, rgba(7,12,24,.35) 55%, rgba(7,12,24,.86) 100%),
      linear-gradient(180deg, rgba(7,12,24,.72) 0%, rgba(7,12,24,.10) 26%, rgba(7,12,24,.20) 55%, rgba(7,12,24,.96) 100%);
  }
  /* subtle blue tint over the whole hero for the "elite navy" mood */
  .hero-tint{
    position:absolute;inset:0;background:radial-gradient(140% 120% at 50% 0%, rgba(20,40,80,.30), rgba(7,12,24,0) 60%);
    mix-blend-mode:screen;pointer-events:none;
  }
  .hero-content{
    position:relative;z-index:3;
    max-width:var(--maxw);margin:0 auto;width:100%;
    padding:0 28px 9vh;
  }
  .hero-tagline{
    font-family:var(--display);
    text-transform:uppercase;letter-spacing:.32em;font-weight:700;
    font-size:clamp(.78rem,1.6vw,1rem);color:var(--silver);
    margin-bottom:18px;opacity:0;animation:rise .8s .35s ease forwards;
  }
  .hero-tagline span{color:var(--red-bright)}
  .hero h1{
    font-family:var(--display);font-style:italic;font-weight:900;
    text-transform:uppercase;line-height:.82;letter-spacing:-.015em;
    font-size:clamp(3.6rem,13vw,10.5rem);
    margin:0 0 8px;position:relative;
  }
  .hero h1 .l1, .hero h1 .l2{display:block;opacity:0}
  .hero h1 .l1{
    background:linear-gradient(180deg,#fff 0%,#aeb8c9 55%,#717c92 100%);
    -webkit-background-clip:text;background-clip:text;color:transparent;
    text-shadow:0 4px 40px rgba(0,0,0,.5);
    animation:rise 1s .55s ease forwards;
  }
  .hero h1 .l2{
    background:linear-gradient(180deg,var(--red-bright) 0%,var(--red) 50%,var(--red-deep) 100%);
    -webkit-background-clip:text;background-clip:text;color:transparent;
    text-shadow:0 4px 50px rgba(215,56,46,.4);
    animation:rise 1s .68s ease forwards;
  }
  .hero-sub{
    max-width:540px;font-size:1.18rem;color:var(--silver);
    margin:22px 0 34px;opacity:0;animation:rise .8s .82s ease forwards;
  }
  .hero-cta{display:flex;gap:16px;flex-wrap:wrap;opacity:0;animation:rise .8s .96s ease forwards}
  @keyframes rise{from{opacity:0;transform:translateY(26px)}to{opacity:1;transform:translateY(0)}}

  .scroll-cue{
    position:absolute;bottom:26px;left:50%;transform:translateX(-50%);z-index:4;
    font-family:var(--display);text-transform:uppercase;letter-spacing:.3em;font-size:.7rem;color:var(--steel);
    display:flex;flex-direction:column;align-items:center;gap:8px;opacity:0;animation:rise 1s 1.25s ease forwards;
  }
  .scroll-cue .dot{width:1px;height:34px;background:linear-gradient(var(--red),transparent);animation:cue 1.8s ease-in-out infinite}
  @keyframes cue{0%,100%{transform:scaleY(.4);opacity:.4}50%{transform:scaleY(1);opacity:1}}

  /* ---------- SECTION SHELL ---------- */
  section{position:relative}
  .pad{padding:clamp(80px,11vh,140px) 0}
  .reveal{opacity:0;transform:translateY(34px);transition:opacity .8s ease, transform .8s ease}
  .reveal.in{opacity:1;transform:none}

  /* ---------- SOFTWARE / INTRO ---------- */
  #software{background:
      linear-gradient(180deg,var(--bg) 0%, var(--bg-2) 100%);
  }
  .split{display:grid;grid-template-columns:1.05fr .95fr;gap:64px;align-items:center}
  .intro-lead{font-size:1.16rem;color:var(--silver);margin:24px 0 22px;max-width:46ch}
  .intro-note{
    font-family:var(--display);font-weight:700;font-style:italic;
    font-size:1.35rem;color:var(--white);line-height:1.15;
    padding-left:18px;border-left:3px solid var(--red);margin-top:26px;
  }
  .feature-card{
    background:linear-gradient(165deg,var(--panel),var(--bg-2));
    border:1px solid var(--line);border-radius:8px;
    padding:38px 34px;
    box-shadow:0 30px 70px -30px rgba(0,0,0,.8);
    position:relative;overflow:hidden;
  }
  .feature-card::before{
    content:"";position:absolute;top:0;left:0;right:0;height:3px;
    background:linear-gradient(90deg,var(--red),transparent);
  }
  .feature-card h3{
    font-family:var(--display);text-transform:uppercase;font-weight:700;
    letter-spacing:.12em;font-size:1rem;color:var(--steel);margin-bottom:24px;
  }
  .flist{list-style:none;display:flex;flex-direction:column;gap:2px}
  .flist li{
    display:flex;align-items:center;gap:16px;padding:16px 0;
    border-bottom:1px solid var(--line);
  }
  .flist li:last-child{border-bottom:none}
  .flist .ic{
    flex:0 0 32px;height:32px;border-radius:50%;
    display:grid;place-items:center;
    background:rgba(215,56,46,.12);border:1px solid rgba(215,56,46,.4);
  }
  .flist .ic svg{width:15px;height:15px;stroke:var(--red-bright)}
  .flist .txt{font-family:var(--display);font-weight:600;font-size:1.18rem;color:var(--white);letter-spacing:.01em}

  /* ---------- STATS ---------- */
  .stats{border-top:1px solid var(--line);border-bottom:1px solid var(--line);background:var(--bg-2)}
  .stats-grid{display:grid;grid-template-columns:repeat(4,1fr)}
  .stat{padding:48px 24px;text-align:center;border-right:1px solid var(--line)}
  .stat:last-child{border-right:none}
  .stat .num{
    font-family:var(--display);font-weight:900;font-style:italic;
    font-size:clamp(2.6rem,5vw,3.8rem);line-height:1;
    background:linear-gradient(180deg,#fff,#8c97ad);
    -webkit-background-clip:text;background-clip:text;color:transparent;
  }
  .stat .num.red{background:linear-gradient(180deg,var(--red-bright),var(--red-deep));-webkit-background-clip:text;background-clip:text;color:transparent}
  .stat .lbl{
    font-family:var(--display);text-transform:uppercase;letter-spacing:.2em;
    font-weight:600;font-size:.82rem;color:var(--steel);margin-top:12px;
  }

  /* ---------- DYNO ---------- */
  #dyno{background:
      radial-gradient(120% 90% at 80% 10%, rgba(20,45,90,.25), rgba(7,12,24,0) 55%),
      linear-gradient(180deg,var(--bg-2),var(--bg));
  }
  .dyno-grid{display:grid;grid-template-columns:.85fr 1.15fr;gap:60px;align-items:center}
  .dyno-chart{
    background:linear-gradient(165deg,var(--panel-2),var(--bg-2));
    border:1px solid var(--line);border-radius:10px;padding:26px 22px 18px;
    box-shadow:0 40px 90px -40px rgba(0,0,0,.85);
  }
  .dyno-head{display:flex;justify-content:space-between;align-items:flex-end;margin-bottom:8px;padding:0 6px}
  .dyno-head .t{font-family:var(--display);text-transform:uppercase;letter-spacing:.18em;font-size:.82rem;color:var(--steel);font-weight:600}
  .legend{display:flex;gap:18px}
  .legend span{display:flex;align-items:center;gap:8px;font-family:var(--display);font-size:.82rem;font-weight:600;letter-spacing:.06em;color:var(--silver)}
  .legend i{width:18px;height:3px;border-radius:2px;display:inline-block}
  .dyno-cta-note{
    font-family:var(--display);font-style:italic;font-weight:700;
    color:var(--white);font-size:1.25rem;line-height:1.2;
    margin:26px 0 26px;padding-left:18px;border-left:3px solid var(--red);
  }
  .dyno-tags{display:flex;flex-wrap:wrap;gap:12px;margin-top:8px}
  .tag{
    font-family:var(--display);text-transform:uppercase;letter-spacing:.12em;
    font-weight:600;font-size:.82rem;color:var(--silver);
    padding:8px 16px;border:1px solid var(--line-strong);border-radius:40px;
  }
  .tag b{color:var(--red-bright)}

  /* ---------- PROCESS ---------- */
  #proces{background:var(--bg)}
  .proc-head{display:flex;justify-content:space-between;align-items:flex-end;gap:30px;flex-wrap:wrap;margin-bottom:60px}
  .proc-head p{max-width:42ch;color:var(--steel)}
  .steps{display:grid;grid-template-columns:repeat(3,1fr);gap:26px}
  .step{
    position:relative;background:linear-gradient(170deg,var(--panel),var(--bg-2));
    border:1px solid var(--line);border-radius:10px;padding:42px 32px 38px;
    overflow:hidden;transition:transform .35s ease, border-color .35s ease;
  }
  .step:hover{transform:translateY(-6px);border-color:rgba(215,56,46,.45)}
  .step .idx{
    font-family:var(--display);font-style:italic;font-weight:900;
    font-size:5.5rem;line-height:.8;
    color:transparent;-webkit-text-stroke:1.5px rgba(126,139,166,.30);
    position:absolute;top:18px;right:22px;pointer-events:none;
  }
  .step:hover .idx{-webkit-text-stroke:1.5px rgba(215,56,46,.55)}
  .step .knum{
    font-family:var(--display);font-style:italic;font-weight:900;font-size:1.1rem;
    color:var(--red-bright);letter-spacing:.1em;margin-bottom:18px;display:block;
  }
  .step h3{
    font-family:var(--display);text-transform:uppercase;font-weight:800;
    font-size:1.55rem;line-height:1;color:var(--white);margin-bottom:16px;max-width:13ch;
  }
  .step p{color:var(--steel);font-size:1rem}
  .step .bar{position:absolute;left:0;bottom:0;height:3px;width:0;background:var(--red);transition:width .5s ease}
  .step:hover .bar{width:100%}

  /* ---------- CTA / KONTAKT ---------- */
  #kontakt{
    background:
      linear-gradient(180deg,var(--bg),var(--bg-2));
    border-top:1px solid var(--line);
  }
  .cta-box{
    position:relative;background:linear-gradient(135deg,var(--panel-2),var(--bg-2));
    border:1px solid var(--line);border-radius:14px;overflow:hidden;
    padding:clamp(44px,6vw,72px);
    box-shadow:0 50px 120px -50px rgba(0,0,0,.9);
  }
  .cta-box::before{
    content:"";position:absolute;right:-80px;top:-80px;width:340px;height:340px;
    background:radial-gradient(circle,rgba(215,56,46,.30),transparent 70%);
  }
  .cta-box::after{
    content:"";position:absolute;left:0;top:0;bottom:0;width:5px;background:linear-gradient(180deg,var(--red-bright),var(--red-deep));
  }
  .cta-inner{position:relative;z-index:2;display:flex;justify-content:space-between;align-items:center;gap:40px;flex-wrap:wrap}
  .cta-inner h2{
    font-family:var(--display);text-transform:uppercase;font-weight:900;font-style:italic;
    font-size:clamp(2.2rem,5vw,3.6rem);line-height:.95;color:var(--white);letter-spacing:-.01em;
  }
  .cta-inner h2 span{color:var(--red-bright)}
  .cta-inner p{max-width:40ch;margin-top:14px;color:var(--silver)}
  .contact-row{display:flex;gap:14px;flex-wrap:wrap;margin-top:30px}
  .contact-chip{
    display:flex;align-items:center;gap:10px;
    padding:12px 18px;border:1px solid var(--line-strong);border-radius:6px;
    font-family:var(--display);font-weight:600;letter-spacing:.04em;color:var(--silver);
    transition:border-color .25s,color .25s,transform .25s;
  }
  .contact-chip svg{width:17px;height:17px;stroke:var(--red-bright);fill:none}
  .contact-chip:hover{border-color:var(--red);color:var(--white);transform:translateY(-2px)}

  /* ---------- FOOTER ---------- */
  footer{background:var(--bg);border-top:1px solid var(--line);padding:46px 0 38px}
  .foot{display:flex;justify-content:space-between;align-items:center;gap:24px;flex-wrap:wrap}
  .foot img{height:54px;width:auto}
  .foot .meta{font-size:.85rem;color:var(--steel);text-align:right}
  .foot .meta b{color:var(--silver);font-family:var(--display);letter-spacing:.05em}

  /* ---------- GALLERI ---------- */
  #galleri{background:linear-gradient(180deg,var(--bg) 0%, var(--bg-2) 100%)}
  .gal-head{margin-bottom:48px}
  .gal-grid{display:grid;grid-template-columns:repeat(12,1fr);grid-auto-rows:282px;gap:22px}
  .gcard{
    position:relative;overflow:hidden;border-radius:10px;
    border:1px solid var(--line);display:block;
    box-shadow:0 30px 70px -40px rgba(0,0,0,.9);
  }
  .gcard.feat{grid-column:span 7;grid-row:span 2}
  .gcard.small{grid-column:span 5}
  .gcard img{
    position:absolute;inset:0;width:100%;height:100%;object-fit:cover;
    transform:scale(1.03);transition:transform 1s cubic-bezier(.2,.6,.2,1), filter .6s ease;
    filter:saturate(1.02) contrast(1.02);
  }
  .gcard:hover img{transform:scale(1.1)}
  .gcard::after{
    content:"";position:absolute;inset:0;
    background:linear-gradient(180deg,rgba(7,12,24,0) 30%,rgba(7,12,24,.55) 70%,rgba(5,8,16,.92) 100%);
  }
  .gcard .cap{position:absolute;left:0;right:0;bottom:0;z-index:2;padding:26px 28px;transform:translateY(8px);transition:transform .45s ease}
  .gcard:hover .cap{transform:translateY(0)}
  .gcard .mdl{
    font-family:var(--display);font-style:italic;font-weight:900;text-transform:uppercase;
    font-size:1.8rem;line-height:.95;color:var(--white);
  }
  .gcard.feat .mdl{font-size:2.7rem}
  .gcard .tg{
    font-family:var(--display);text-transform:uppercase;letter-spacing:.18em;font-weight:600;
    font-size:.8rem;color:var(--red-bright);margin-top:10px;display:flex;align-items:center;gap:.6rem;
  }
  .gcard .tg::before{content:"";width:24px;height:2px;background:var(--red);display:inline-block}
  .gcard .corner{
    position:absolute;top:18px;right:18px;z-index:3;width:44px;height:44px;border-radius:50%;
    display:grid;place-items:center;font-size:1.1rem;color:#fff;
    background:rgba(7,12,24,.45);border:1px solid var(--line-strong);backdrop-filter:blur(4px);
    opacity:0;transform:scale(.7) rotate(-25deg);transition:.4s cubic-bezier(.2,.7,.2,1);
  }
  .gcard:hover .corner{opacity:1;transform:scale(1) rotate(0)}
  .gcard:hover{border-color:rgba(215,56,46,.45)}


  @media(max-width:960px){
    .split{grid-template-columns:1fr;gap:40px}
    .dyno-grid{grid-template-columns:1fr;gap:40px}
    .steps{grid-template-columns:1fr}
    .gal-grid{grid-auto-rows:auto}
    .gcard.feat,.gcard.small{grid-column:1/-1;grid-row:auto;min-height:300px}
    .gcard.feat{min-height:360px}
    .stats-grid{grid-template-columns:repeat(2,1fr)}
    .stat:nth-child(2){border-right:none}
    .stat:nth-child(1),.stat:nth-child(2){border-bottom:1px solid var(--line)}
  }
  @media(max-width:760px){
    .nav-links{
      position:fixed;inset:0 0 0 auto;width:78%;max-width:320px;
      background:rgba(8,13,26,.97);backdrop-filter:blur(16px);
      flex-direction:column;align-items:flex-start;justify-content:center;
      padding:40px;gap:26px;transform:translateX(110%);transition:transform .4s ease;
      border-left:1px solid var(--line);
    }
    .nav-links.open{transform:translateX(0)}
    .nav-links .btn{width:100%}
    .nav-toggle{display:block;z-index:60}
    .hero-content{padding-bottom:13vh}
  }
  @media(max-width:520px){
    .stats-grid{grid-template-columns:1fr}
    .stat{border-right:none;border-bottom:1px solid var(--line)}
    .cta-inner{flex-direction:column;align-items:flex-start}
    body{font-size:16px}
  }

  @media(prefers-reduced-motion:reduce){
    *{animation:none!important;transition:none!important}
    .reveal{opacity:1;transform:none}
    .hero-bg{transform:scale(1.03);filter:none;opacity:1}
    .hero h1 .l1,.hero h1 .l2{opacity:1}
    .hero-tagline,.hero-sub,.hero-cta,.scroll-cue{opacity:1}
    header.nav{opacity:1;transform:none}
  }
</style>
</head>
<body>

<!-- NAV -->
<header class="nav" id="nav">
  <div class="nav-inner">
    <a href="#top" class="nav-logo"><img src="data:image/png;base64," alt="Performance Tuning"></a>
    <nav class="nav-links" id="navLinks">
      <a href="#software">Software</a>
      <a href="#dyno">Effekt</a>
      <a href="#galleri">Galleri</a>
      <a href="#proces">Sådan foregår det</a>
      <a href="#kontakt">Kontakt</a>
      <a href="#kontakt" class="btn btn-red">Anmod om pris <span class="arrow">→</span></a>
    </nav>
    <button class="nav-toggle" id="navToggle" aria-label="Menu">
      <svg width="28" height="28" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2"><line x1="3" y1="7" x2="21" y2="7"/><line x1="3" y1="12" x2="21" y2="12"/><line x1="3" y1="17" x2="21" y2="17"/></svg>
    </button>
  </div>
</header>

<!-- HERO -->
<section class="hero" id="top">
  <div class="hero-bg"></div>
  <div class="hero-tint"></div>
  <div class="hero-content">
    <div class="hero-tagline">Danmarks <span>førende</span> indenfor tuning af biler</div>
    <h1>
      <span class="l1">Performance</span>
      <span class="l2">Tuning</span>
    </h1>
    <p class="hero-sub">Skræddersyet in-house software og effektmåling på rullefelt — udviklet til præcis din bil.</p>
    <div class="hero-cta">
      <a href="#kontakt" class="btn btn-red">Anmod om pris <span class="arrow">→</span></a>
      <a href="#proces" class="btn btn-ghost">Sådan foregår det</a>
    </div>
  </div>
  <div class="scroll-cue">Scroll<span class="dot"></span></div>
</section>

<!-- SOFTWARE / INTRO -->
<section id="software" class="pad">
  <div class="wrap">
    <div class="split">
      <div class="reveal">
        <span class="eyebrow">In-house software</span>
        <h2 class="section-title" style="margin-top:18px">In-house software<br>til netop din bil!</h2>
        <p class="intro-lead">Hos Performance Tuning er du sikret skræddersyet software til netop din bil. Vi har siden 2014 leveret tuningsoftware til private og erhvervskunder på det danske marked.</p>
        <p class="intro-lead">Vi leverer samtidig software til vores forhandlere verden over.</p>
        <p class="intro-note">Besøg os på vores værksted og få optimeret din bil på rullefelt!</p>
      </div>
      <div class="reveal feature-card">
        <h3>Derfor vælger du Performance Tuning</h3>
        <ul class="flist">
          <li><span class="ic"><svg viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke-width="3" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round"><polyline points="4 12 10 18 20 6"/></svg></span><span class="txt">In-house software</span></li>
          <li><span class="ic"><svg viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke-width="3" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round"><polyline points="4 12 10 18 20 6"/></svg></span><span class="txt">100% tilfredshedsgaranti</span></li>
          <li><span class="ic"><svg viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke-width="3" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round"><polyline points="4 12 10 18 20 6"/></svg></span><span class="txt">Markedsleder siden 2014</span></li>
          <li><span class="ic"><svg viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke-width="3" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round"><polyline points="4 12 10 18 20 6"/></svg></span><span class="txt">Distributør til forhandlere verden over</span></li>
          <li><span class="ic"><svg viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke-width="3" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round"><polyline points="4 12 10 18 20 6"/></svg></span><span class="txt">Rullefelt op til 2000 HK</span></li>
        </ul>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>
</section>

<!-- STATS -->
<section class="stats">
  <div class="stats-grid">
    <div class="stat reveal"><div class="num">2014</div><div class="lbl">Markedsleder siden</div></div>
    <div class="stat reveal"><div class="num red">2000<span style="font-size:.5em"> HK</span></div><div class="lbl">Rullefelt op til</div></div>
    <div class="stat reveal"><div class="num">100%</div><div class="lbl">Tilfredshedsgaranti</div></div>
    <div class="stat reveal"><div class="num">∞</div><div class="lbl">Forhandlere verden over</div></div>
  </div>
</section>

<!-- DYNO -->
<section id="dyno" class="pad">
  <div class="wrap">
    <div class="dyno-grid">
      <div class="reveal">
        <span class="eyebrow">Effekt på rullefelt</span>
        <h2 class="section-title" style="margin-top:18px">Mærk<br>forskellen</h2>
        <p class="dyno-cta-note">Kontakt os for pris og effekt.</p>
        <p style="color:var(--steel);max-width:44ch">Effektmålinger og finjusteringer foregår på vores rullefelt, som kan simulere vejbelastning — så du får et reelt billede af, hvad din bil kan.</p>
        <div class="dyno-tags">
          <span class="tag"><b>+</b> Mere effekt</span>
          <span class="tag"><b>+</b> Bedre respons</span>
          <span class="tag">Rullefelt op til <b>2000 HK</b></span>
        </div>
      </div>
      <div class="reveal dyno-chart">
        <div class="dyno-head">
          <span class="t">Effekt (HK) / omdrejninger</span>
          <div class="legend">
            <span><i style="background:#4E7AB8"></i>Standard</span>
            <span><i style="background:#EE4A3D"></i>Performance Tuning</span>
          </div>
        </div>
        <svg id="dynoSvg" viewBox="0 0 800 420" width="100%" role="img" aria-label="Effektkurve standard versus tuning">
          <!-- grid -->
          <g stroke="rgba(126,139,166,.16)" stroke-width="1">
            <line x1="80" y1="360" x2="760" y2="360"/>
            <line x1="80" y1="280" x2="760" y2="280"/>
            <line x1="80" y1="200" x2="760" y2="200"/>
            <line x1="80" y1="120" x2="760" y2="120"/>
            <line x1="80" y1="40"  x2="760" y2="40"/>
          </g>
          <g stroke="rgba(126,139,166,.10)" stroke-width="1">
            <line x1="193" y1="40" x2="193" y2="360"/>
            <line x1="306" y1="40" x2="306" y2="360"/>
            <line x1="420" y1="40" x2="420" y2="360"/>
            <line x1="533" y1="40" x2="533" y2="360"/>
            <line x1="646" y1="40" x2="646" y2="360"/>
          </g>
          <!-- axis -->
          <line x1="80" y1="40" x2="80" y2="360" stroke="rgba(126,139,166,.4)" stroke-width="1.5"/>
          <line x1="80" y1="360" x2="760" y2="360" stroke="rgba(126,139,166,.4)" stroke-width="1.5"/>
          <!-- rpm labels -->
          <g fill="#7E8BA6" font-family="'Saira Condensed',sans-serif" font-size="13" text-anchor="middle">
            <text x="80" y="382">1</text><text x="193" y="382">2</text><text x="306" y="382">3</text>
            <text x="420" y="382">4</text><text x="533" y="382">5</text><text x="646" y="382">6</text><text x="760" y="382">7</text>
            <text x="420" y="406" letter-spacing="2">× 1000 OMDR/MIN</text>
          </g>
          <!-- area under tuned -->
          <path id="dynoArea" fill="url(#redFill)" opacity="0" d=""/>
          <defs>
            <linearGradient id="redFill" x1="0" y1="0" x2="0" y2="1">
              <stop offset="0%" stop-color="#EE4A3D" stop-opacity=".28"/>
              <stop offset="100%" stop-color="#EE4A3D" stop-opacity="0"/>
            </linearGradient>
          </defs>
          <path id="curveStd"  fill="none" stroke="#4E7AB8" stroke-width="3" stroke-linecap="round" d=""/>
          <path id="curveTune" fill="none" stroke="#EE4A3D" stroke-width="3.5" stroke-linecap="round" d="" style="filter:drop-shadow(0 0 6px rgba(238,74,61,.5))"/>
          <circle id="peakDot" r="5" fill="#EE4A3D" opacity="0"/>
        </svg>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>
</section>

<!-- PROCESS -->
<section id="proces" class="pad">
  <div class="wrap">
    <div class="proc-head reveal">
      <div>
        <span class="eyebrow">Sådan foregår det</span>
        <h2 class="section-title" style="margin-top:18px">Fra forespørgsel<br>til fornyet køreglæde</h2>
      </div>
      <p>Tre enkle trin — fra du tager kontakt, til du kører hjem med mærkbart mere effekt.</p>
    </div>
    <div class="steps">
      <div class="step reveal">
        <span class="idx">01</span>
        <span class="knum">Trin 01</span>
        <h3>Kontakt os for pris og effekt</h3>
        <p>Kontakt os på telefon, mail eller sociale medier for at høre mere om, hvad vi kan gøre på din bil. Herefter kan du bestille tid til en optimering.</p>
        <div class="bar"></div>
      </div>
      <div class="step reveal">
        <span class="idx">02</span>
        <span class="knum">Trin 02</span>
        <h3>Besøg os på vores værksted</h3>
        <p>På vores værksted optimerer vi din bil med vores in-house software. Effektmålinger og finjusteringer foregår på vores rullefelt, som kan simulere vejbelastning.</p>
        <div class="bar"></div>
      </div>
      <div class="step reveal">
        <span class="idx">03</span>
        <span class="knum">Trin 03</span>
        <h3>Nyd den ekstra effekt og køreglæde</h3>
        <p>Du kan nu køre hjem og nyde din bil med fornyet effekt og køreglæde — skræddersyet til netop din bil.</p>
        <div class="bar"></div>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>
</section>

<!-- GALLERI -->
<section id="galleri" class="pad">
  <div class="wrap">
    <div class="gal-head reveal">
      <span class="eyebrow">Udvalgte optimeringer</span>
      <h2 class="section-title" style="margin-top:18px">Biler fra<br>vores værksted</h2>
    </div>
    <div class="gal-grid">
      <a class="gcard feat reveal" href="#kontakt">
        <img src="data:image/jpeg;base64," alt="Audi RS5 optimering">
        <span class="corner">→</span>
        <div class="cap"><div class="mdl">Audi RS5</div><div class="tg">Trin 2 · Effektoptimering</div></div>
      </a>
      <a class="gcard small reveal" href="#kontakt">
        <img src="data:image/jpeg;base64," alt="BMW 4-serie optimering">
        <span class="corner">→</span>
        <div class="cap"><div class="mdl">BMW 4-serie</div><div class="tg">Custom in-house software</div></div>
      </a>
      <a class="gcard small reveal" href="#kontakt">
        <img src="data:image/jpeg;base64," alt="Mercedes-AMG E63 optimering">
        <span class="corner">→</span>
        <div class="cap"><div class="mdl">Mercedes-AMG E63</div><div class="tg">Finjusteret på rullefelt</div></div>
      </a>
    </div>
  </div>
</section>

<!-- KONTAKT / CTA -->
<section id="kontakt" class="pad">
  <div class="wrap">
    <div class="cta-box reveal">
      <div class="cta-inner">
        <div>
          <h2>Klar til mere <span>effekt?</span></h2>
          <p>Kontakt os, og hør hvad vi kan gøre for din bil. Herefter booker vi tid til en optimering på vores rullefelt.</p>
          <div class="contact-row">
            <a class="contact-chip" href="tel:+4500000000"><svg viewBox="0 0 24 24" stroke-width="2"><path d="M22 16.92v3a2 2 0 0 1-2.18 2 19.79 19.79 0 0 1-8.63-3.07 19.5 19.5 0 0 1-6-6 19.79 19.79 0 0 1-3.07-8.67A2 2 0 0 1 4.11 2h3a2 2 0 0 1 2 1.72c.13.96.36 1.9.7 2.81a2 2 0 0 1-.45 2.11L8.09 9.91a16 16 0 0 0 6 6l1.27-1.27a2 2 0 0 1 2.11-.45c.91.34 1.85.57 2.81.7A2 2 0 0 1 22 16.92z"/></svg>Telefon</a>
            <a class="contact-chip" href="mailto:info@performancetuning.dk"><svg viewBox="0 0 24 24" stroke-width="2"><rect x="2" y="4" width="20" height="16" rx="2"/><path d="m22 7-10 6L2 7"/></svg>Mail</a>
            <a class="contact-chip" href="#"><svg viewBox="0 0 24 24" stroke-width="2"><circle cx="12" cy="12" r="3"/><rect x="3" y="3" width="18" height="18" rx="5"/><circle cx="17.5" cy="6.5" r="1" fill="#EE4A3D" stroke="none"/></svg>Sociale medier</a>
          </div>
        </div>
        <a href="#top" class="btn btn-red" style="font-size:1.1rem;padding:18px 34px">Anmod om pris <span class="arrow">→</span></a>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>
</section>

<!-- FOOTER -->
<footer>
  <div class="wrap foot">
    <img src="data:image/png;base64," alt="Performance Tuning">
    <div class="meta">
      <b>PERFORMANCE TUNING</b><br>
      Danmarks førende indenfor tuning af biler · Markedsleder siden 2014<br>
      © <span id="yr"></span> Performance Tuning. Alle rettigheder forbeholdes.
    </div>
  </div>
</footer>

<script>
  // year
  document.getElementById('yr').textContent = new Date().getFullYear();

  // nav scrolled state
  const nav = document.getElementById('nav');
  const onScroll = () => nav.classList.toggle('scrolled', window.scrollY > 40);
  onScroll(); window.addEventListener('scroll', onScroll, {passive:true});

  // mobile menu
  const toggle = document.getElementById('navToggle');
  const links = document.getElementById('navLinks');
  toggle.addEventListener('click', () => links.classList.toggle('open'));
  links.querySelectorAll('a').forEach(a => a.addEventListener('click', () => links.classList.remove('open')));

  // reveal on scroll
  const io = new IntersectionObserver((entries) => {
    entries.forEach(e => { if(e.isIntersecting){ e.target.classList.add('in'); io.unobserve(e.target); } });
  }, {threshold:0.16});
  document.querySelectorAll('.reveal').forEach(el => io.observe(el));

  // ---- DYNO CURVES ----
  // points: [x, y] in viewBox coords. Higher = more power (smaller y).
  const stdPts  = [[80,311],[193,262],[306,213],[420,173],[533,147],[590,138],[646,140],[760,151]];
  const tunePts = [[80,293],[193,227],[306,151],[420,93],[533,62],[590,58],[646,62],[760,77]];

  // Catmull-Rom -> smooth cubic bezier path
  function smoothPath(pts){
    if(pts.length < 2) return '';
    let d = `M ${pts[0][0]} ${pts[0][1]}`;
    for(let i=0;i<pts.length-1;i++){
      const p0 = pts[i-1]||pts[i];
      const p1 = pts[i];
      const p2 = pts[i+1];
      const p3 = pts[i+2]||p2;
      const c1x = p1[0] + (p2[0]-p0[0])/6;
      const c1y = p1[1] + (p2[1]-p0[1])/6;
      const c2x = p2[0] - (p3[0]-p1[0])/6;
      const c2y = p2[1] - (p3[1]-p1[1])/6;
      d += ` C ${c1x.toFixed(1)} ${c1y.toFixed(1)}, ${c2x.toFixed(1)} ${c2y.toFixed(1)}, ${p2[0]} ${p2[1]}`;
    }
    return d;
  }

  const std = document.getElementById('curveStd');
  const tune = document.getElementById('curveTune');
  const area = document.getElementById('dynoArea');
  const peak = document.getElementById('peakDot');
  const stdD = smoothPath(stdPts);
  const tuneD = smoothPath(tunePts);
  std.setAttribute('d', stdD);
  tune.setAttribute('d', tuneD);
  area.setAttribute('d', tuneD + ` L 760 360 L 80 360 Z`);
  peak.setAttribute('cx', 590); peak.setAttribute('cy', 58);

  const reduce = window.matchMedia('(prefers-reduced-motion: reduce)').matches;

  function setupDraw(path){
    const len = path.getTotalLength();
    path.style.strokeDasharray = len;
    path.style.strokeDashoffset = reduce ? 0 : len;
    return len;
  }
  setupDraw(std); setupDraw(tune);

  const dynoIO = new IntersectionObserver((entries) => {
    entries.forEach(e => {
      if(e.isIntersecting){
        if(!reduce){
          std.style.transition  = 'stroke-dashoffset 1.5s ease .1s';
          tune.style.transition = 'stroke-dashoffset 1.7s ease .35s';
          std.style.strokeDashoffset = 0;
          tune.style.strokeDashoffset = 0;
          area.style.transition = 'opacity 1s ease 1.6s';
          area.style.opacity = 1;
          peak.style.transition = 'opacity .5s ease 2s';
          peak.style.opacity = 1;
        } else {
          area.style.opacity = 1; peak.style.opacity = 1;
        }
        dynoIO.unobserve(e.target);
      }
    });
  }, {threshold:0.4});
  dynoIO.observe(document.getElementById('dynoSvg'));
</script>
</body>
</html>
